functions.name: eq
functions.description: Returns true if two values are equal. Float-aware: if either argument is a float, both are compared as floats.

functions.name: neq
functions.description: Returns true if two values are not equal.

functions.name: gt
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is greater than the second.

functions.name: lt
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is less than the second. Float-aware.

functions.name: gte
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is greater than or equal to the second.

functions.name: lte
functions.description: Returns true if the first value is less than or equal to the second.

functions.name: set
functions.description: Assigns one or more variables. Used internally by the compiler for assignment statements. Full form: {var, value}. Shorthand: {key: val, ...}.

functions.name: add
functions.description: Returns the sum of two values. Float-aware: if either argument is a float, the result is a float.

functions.name: sub
functions.description: Returns the difference of two values. Float-aware.

functions.name: mul
functions.description: Returns the product of two values. Float-aware.

functions.name: div
functions.description: Returns the quotient of two values. Float-aware. Sets $! to MTA_ERR_DIV_ZERO on division by zero.

functions.name: mod
functions.description: Returns the integer remainder of two values. Sets $! on division by zero.

functions.name: inc
functions.description: Increments a numeric variable by 1. Creates the variable with value 1 if it does not exist.

functions.name: dec
functions.description: Decrements a numeric variable by 1. Creates the variable with value -1 if it does not exist.

functions.name: strcmp
functions.description: Compares two strings lexicographically. Result is stored in $_: 0 if equal, negative if a < b, positive if a > b.

returns.description: 0 if equal, negative if a < b, positive if a > b

functions.name: strlen
functions.description: Returns the length of a string.

returns.description: Number of characters in the string

functions.name: charat
functions.description: Returns the character at a given index in a string as a single-character string. Returns empty string if index is out of bounds.

returns.description: Single-character string at the given index

functions.name: concat
functions.description: Concatenates two or more values into a single string. Accepts any number of arguments. Maximum result length is 256 characters.

functions.name: chr
functions.description: Converts an integer ASCII code (0-255) to a single-character string.

functions.name: to_string
functions.description: Converts a value to its string representation. Integers become decimal strings, floats include decimal point.

args.name: value
args.description: Value to convert (int, float, or string)

functions.name: round
functions.description: Rounds a floating-point value to the nearest integer using banker's rounding.

functions.name: getbyte
functions.description: Reads a byte at a given index from a byte array. Sets $! to MTA_ERR_ARRAY_BOUNDS if index is out of range.

args.name: array
args.description: Variable reference to the byte array

returns.description: Byte value (0-255) at the given index

functions.name: setbyte
functions.description: Writes a byte at a given index in a byte array. Extends the array if index equals its current size. Sets $! on error.

args.name: array
args.description: Variable reference to the byte array
